title: Designing a Personalized Recommendation System with Graph Embeddings
scenario: Design a personalized recommendation system using graph embeddings for an e-commerce platform. The system must be able to recommend products to users based on their past purchases, browsing history, and social connections. The output should be a Python function (as code) implementing the graph embedding algorithm. Constraints: Must use a graph library (e.g., NetworkX), must use a neural network library (e.g., TensorFlow), and must be under 500 lines of code. The evaluation criteria are: (1) accuracy of product recommendations (35 points), (2) efficiency of the graph embedding algorithm (25 points), (3) scalability of the system (20 points), (4) maintainability of the code (10 points), and (5) adherence to best practices (10 points).
constraints: Must use a graph library (e.g., NetworkX)
Must use a neural network library (e.g., TensorFlow)
Must be under 500 lines of code

evaluationCriteria.description: Evaluates the accuracy of product recommendations generated by the graph embedding algorithm.
Checks the efficiency of the graph embedding algorithm in terms of computation time and memory usage.
Assesses the scalability of the system in terms of handling large user bases and product catalogs.
Evaluates the maintainability of the code in terms of readability, modularity, and testability.
Checks if the code adheres to best practices in terms of security, performance, and code organization.
